title: Walk-behind mower with wide angle illumination
abstract: A walk-behind mower has a mower deck, a plurality of wheels, a head, and a plurality of light sources. The wheels are rotatably coupled to the mower deck. The wheels move the walk-behind mower over a support surface in a forward direction and a rearward direction. The head is coupled to the mower deck. The head can store at least one battery pack. The light sources are coupled to at least one of the mower deck and the head. The light sources project light through a continuous illumination angle about the walk-behind mower. The illumination angle extends along an arc from the forward direction toward the rearward direction and is at least 90 degrees.
claims: 1. A walk-behind mower comprising: a mower deck defining a deck perimeter, wherein the mower deck comprises a sidewall and a top wall coupled to the sidewall; a head coupled to the mower deck; a plurality of wheels rotatably coupled to the mower deck, the plurality of wheels including a pair of front wheels rotatable about a front axis and a pair of rear wheels rotatable about a rear axis; a control bar assembly extending from the mower deck rearward relative the rear wh axis; and a light source coupled to the sidewall of the mower deck, the light source configured to project light away from the walk-behind mower in a primary direction that leaves the deck perimeter between the front axis and the rear axis and subsequently crosses the front axis.
